1→package com.multilanglearner.navigation
     2→
     3→import androidx.compose.runtime.Composable
     4→import androidx.navigation.NavType
     5→import androidx.navigation.compose.NavHost
     6→import androidx.navigation.compose.composable
     7→import androidx.navigation.compose.rememberNavController
     8→import androidx.navigation.navArgument
     9→import com.multilanglearner.ui.home.HomeScreen
    10→import com.multilanglearner.ui.player.PlayerScreen
    11→import com.multilanglearner.ui.vocabulary.VocabularyScreen
    12→import com.multilanglearner.ui.regulation.RegulationScreen
    13→
    14→@Composable
    15→fun NavGraph() {
    16→    val navController = rememberNavController()
    17→
    18→    NavHost(navController = navController, startDestination = "home") {
    19→        composable("home") {
    20→            HomeScreen(
    21→                onNavigateToPlayer = { videoPath, subtitlePath ->
    22→                    val encodedVideo = java.net.URLEncoder.encode(videoPath, "UTF-8")
    23→                    val encodedSub = subtitlePath?.let { java.net.URLEncoder.encode(it, "UTF-8") } ?: ""
    24→                    navController.navigate("player/$encodedVideo?subtitle=$encodedSub")
    25→                },
    26→                onNavigateToVocabulary = { navController.navigate("vocabulary") },
    27→                onNavigateToRegulation = { navController.navigate("regulation") }
    28→            )
    29→        }
    30→        composable(
    31→            "player/{videoPath}?subtitle={subtitle}",
    32→            arguments = listOf(
    33→                navArgument("videoPath") { type = NavType.StringType },
    34→                navArgument("subtitle") { type = NavType.StringType; defaultValue = "" }
    35→            )
    36→        ) { backStackEntry ->
    37→            val videoPath = java.net.URLDecoder.decode(backStackEntry.arguments?.getString("videoPath") ?: "", "UTF-8")
    38→            val subtitlePath = java.net.URLDecoder.decode(backStackEntry.arguments?.getString("subtitle") ?: "", "UTF-8").ifBlank { null }
    39→            PlayerScreen(
    40→                videoPath = videoPath,
    41→                subtitlePath = subtitlePath,
    42→                onBack = { navController.popBackStack() }
    43→            )
    44→        }
    45→        composable("vocabulary") {
    46→            VocabularyScreen(onBack = { navController.popBackStack() })
    47→        }
    48→        composable("regulation") {
    49→            RegulationScreen(onBack = { navController.popBackStack() })
    50→        }
    51→    }
    52→}

    99→@HiltViewModel
   100→class HomeViewModel @Inject constructor(

   111→    private var currentTiktokCookie: String? = null
   112→
   113→    init {

   115→        viewModelScope.launch {

   172→    /**
   173→     * 下载视频 - 支持 B站、YouTube 等平台
   174→     * 支持最多3个并发下载
   175→     */
   176→    fun downloadVideo(onComplete: (String, String?) -> Unit) {
   177→        val url = _uiState.value.url.trim()
   178→
   179→        if (url.isBlank()) {
   180→            updateCurrentDownload(DownloadTask(url = url, title = "", errorMessage = "请输入视频链接"))
   181→            return
   182→        }
   183→
   184→        // 检查是否已存在相同视频（通过 URL 匹配）
   185→        val existingVideo = _uiState.value.videos.find { it.sourceUrl == url }
   186→        if (existingVideo != null) {
   187→            // 显示重复下载确认对话框

   201→        startDownload(url, onComplete)

   203→
   204→    /**

   209→        val url = _uiState.value.url.trim()

   211→        // 如果已达最大并发数，加入队列

   230→    /**
   231→     * 开始下载

   233→    private fun startDownload(url: String, onComplete: (String, String?) -> Unit) {
   234→        lateinit var job: Job

   257→                        VideoDownloadService.VideoPlatform.YOUTUBE -> false  // YouTube通常不需要Cookie
   258→                        VideoDownloadService.VideoPlatform.DOUYIN -> false  // 抖音使用API解析

   265→                        VideoDownloadService.VideoPlatform.YOUTUBE -> videoDownloadService.hasYouTubeCookie()
   266→                        VideoDownloadService.VideoPlatform.DOUYIN -> videoDownloadService.hasDouyinCookie()
   267→                        VideoDownloadService.VideoPlatform.TIKTOK -> videoDownloadService.hasTiktokCookie()
   268→                        else -> true
   269→                    }
   270→
   271→                    if (needsCookie && !hasCookie) {
   272→                        // 需要登录获取Cookie，根据平台显示不同的登录对话框
   273→                        when (videoInfo.platform) {
   274→                            VideoDownloadService.VideoPlatform.BILIBILI -> {
   275→                                _uiState.update {
   276→                                    it.copy(
   277→                                        showBilibiliLogin = true,

   298→                            VideoDownloadService.VideoPlatform.DOUYIN -> {

   310→                            VideoDownloadService.VideoPlatform.TIKTOK -> {

   312→                                    it.copy(
   313→                                        showTiktokLogin = true,
   314→                                        pendingDownloadUrl = url,
   315→                                        currentDownload = task.copy(

   337→
   338→                    // 使用分段下载器下载，传递Cookie
   339→                    downloadWithSegmentedDownloader(url, videoInfo, safeTitle, outputFile, onComplete)
   340→                }.onFailure { error ->
   341→                    val failedTask = task.copy(
   342→                        status = DownloadStatus.FAILED,
   343→                        errorMessage = "解析失败: ${error.message}\n\n建议：使用导入功能添加本地视频",
   344→                        errorCode = error.javaClass.simpleName
   345→                    )
   346→                    onDownloadFailed(task.id, failedTask, failedTask.errorMessage ?: "解析失败")
   347→                }
   348→
   349→            } catch (e: Exception) {
   350→                android.util.Log.e("HomeViewModel", "Download failed", e)
   351→                val failedTask = task.copy(
   352→                    status = DownloadStatus.FAILED,
   353→                    errorMessage = "下载失败: ${e.message}",
   354→                    errorCode = e.javaClass.simpleName
   355→                )
   356→                onDownloadFailed(task.id, failedTask, failedTask.errorMessage ?: "下载失败")
   357→            }
   358→        }

   361→    /**
   362→     * 使用分段下载器下载视频
   363→     */
   364→    private suspend fun downloadWithSegmentedDownloader(
   365→        url: String,
   366→        videoInfo: com.multilanglearner.data.network.VideoDownloadService.VideoDownloadInfo,
   367→        title: String,
   368→        outputFile: File,
   369→        onComplete: (String, String?) -> Unit
   370→    ) {
   371→        val startTime = System.currentTimeMillis()
   372→        var lastUpdate = startTime
   373→
   374→        try {
   375→            val config = SegmentedDownloader.DownloadConfig(
   376→                url = videoInfo.downloadUrl,
   377→                outputFile = outputFile,
   378→                enableResume = true,
   379→                // 使用当前配置的Cookie（如果可用）
   380→                cookies = currentBilibiliCookie ?: videoInfo.cookies,
   381→                // 音频流URL（用于DASH格式）
   382→                audioUrl = videoInfo.audioUrl,
   383→                onProgress = { progress ->
   384→                    val now = System.currentTimeMillis()
   385→                    // 限制更新频率（每200ms更新一次）
   386→                    if (now - lastUpdate > 200) {
   387→                        val elapsedSeconds = (now - startTime) / 1000.0
   388→                        val speed = progress.speed
   389→                        val remainingBytes = progress.totalBytes - progress.bytesDownloaded
   390→                        val remainingTime = if (speed > 0) remainingBytes / speed else 0L
   391→
   392→                        // 查找对应的任务ID
   393→                        val taskId = activeDownloadTasks.entries.find { it.value.url == url }?.key
   394→                        val currentTask = taskId?.let { activeDownloadTasks[it] }
   395→                        if (taskId != null && currentTask != null) {
   396→                            val updatedTask = currentTask.copy(
   397→                                status = DownloadStatus.DOWNLOADING,
   398→                                progress = progress.percent,
   399→                                bytesDownloaded = progress.bytesDownloaded,
   400→                                totalBytes = progress.totalBytes,
   401→                                speed = speed,
   402→                                remainingTime = remainingTime,
   403→                                title = currentTask.title ?: title
   404→                            )
   405→                            updateActiveDownloadTask(taskId, updatedTask)
   406→                        }
   407→                        lastUpdate = now
   408→                    }
   409→                }
   410→            )
   411→
   412→            val result = segmentedDownloader.download(config)
   413→
   414→            result.onSuccess { file ->
   415→                // 获取任务ID和任务
   416→                val taskId = activeDownloadTasks.entries.find { it.value.url == url }?.key
   417→                val task = taskId?.let { activeDownloadTasks[it] }
   418→
   419→                if (taskId != null && task != null) {
   420→                    val completedTask = task.copy(
   421→                        status = DownloadStatus.COMPLETED,
   422→                        progress = 100,
   423→                        completedAt = System.currentTimeMillis()
   424→                    )
   425→                    onDownloadCompleted(taskId, completedTask, file, onComplete)
   426→                }
   427→            }.onFailure { error ->
   428→                val taskId = activeDownloadTasks.entries.find { it.value.url == url }?.key
   429→                val task = taskId?.let { activeDownloadTasks[it] }
   430→                if (taskId != null && task != null) {
   431→                    onDownloadFailed(taskId, task, "下载失败: ${error.message}")
   432→                }
   433→            }
   434→
   435→        } catch (e: Exception) {
   436→            android.util.Log.e("HomeViewModel", "Segmented download failed", e)
   437→            // 这里不需要额外处理，因为 onFailure 已经处理了
   438→        }
   439→    }

   441→    /**
   442→     * 取消当前下载
   443→     */
   444→    fun cancelDownload(taskId: String? = null) {
   445→        if (taskId != null) {
   446→            // 取消特定任务
   447→            activeDownloadJobs[taskId]?.cancel()
   448→            activeDownloadTasks[taskId]?.let { task ->
   449→                val cancelledTask = task.copy(
   450→                    status = DownloadStatus.CANCELLED,
   451→                    completedAt = System.currentTimeMillis()
   452→                )
   453→                activeDownloadTasks.remove(taskId)
   454→                activeDownloadJobs.remove(taskId)
   455→                updateActiveDownloads()
   456→                updateCurrentDownload(cancelledTask)
   457→                addToHistory(cancelledTask)
   458→
   459→                // 清理临时文件
   460→                if (task.totalBytes > 0) {
   461→                    val safeTitle = task.title.replace(Regex("[\\\\/:*?\"<>|]"), "_").take(50)
   462→                    val outputFile = File(downloadsDir, "${safeTitle}_${task.createdAt}.mp4")
   463→                    segmentedDownloader.cancelDownload(outputFile)
   464→                }
   465→            }
   466→            // 处理队列中的下一个任务
   467→            processQueue()
   468→        } else {
   469→            // 取消所有任务
   470→            activeDownloadJobs.values.forEach { it.cancel() }
   471→            activeDownloadTasks.values.forEach { task ->
   472→                val cancelledTask = task.copy(
   473→                    status = DownloadStatus.CANCELLED,
   474→                    completedAt = System.currentTimeMillis()
   475→                )
   476→                addToHistory(cancelledTask)
   477→
   478→                // 清理临时文件
   479→                if (task.totalBytes > 0) {
   480→                    val safeTitle = task.title.replace(Regex("[\\\\/:*?\"<>|]"), "_").take(50)
   481→                    val outputFile = File(downloadsDir, "${safeTitle}_${task.createdAt}.mp4")
   482→                    segmentedDownloader.cancelDownload(outputFile)
   483→                }
   484→            }
   485→            activeDownloadJobs.clear()
   486→            activeDownloadTasks.clear()
   487→            updateActiveDownloads()
   488→            updateCurrentDownload(null)
   489→        }
   490→    }

   874→    private fun processQueue() {
   875→        if (downloadQueue.isEmpty()) return
   876→        if (activeDownloadTasks.size >= MAX_CONCURRENT_DOWNLOADS) return
   877→
   878→        // 从队列中取出任务
   879→        val (taskId, task) = downloadQueue.entries.first()
   880→        downloadQueue.remove(taskId)
   881→        updateQueueList()

   883→        // 开始下载
   884→        startDownload(task.url) { _, _ -> }
   885→    }

    32→/**

    34→ * 允许用户离开页面后继续转录
    35→ */
    36→@AndroidEntryPoint
    37→class TranscriptionService : Service() {
    38→    companion object {
    39→        private const val TAG = "TranscriptionService"
    40→        private const val CHANNEL_ID = "transcription_channel"
    41→        private const val CHANNEL_NAME = "视频转录"
    42→        private const val NOTIFICATION_ID = 1001
    43→
    44→        const val ACTION_START = "com.multilanglearner.ACTION_START_TRANSCRIPTION"
    45→        const val ACTION_CANCEL = "com.multilanglearner.ACTION_CANCEL_TRANSCRIPTION"
    46→        const val ACTION_OPEN = "com.multilanglearner.ACTION_OPEN_PLAYER"
    47→
    48→        const val EXTRA_VIDEO_PATH = "video_path"
    49→        const val EXTRA_VIDEO_NAME = "video_name"
    50→
    51→        // 进度广播

    53→        const val EXTRA_SEGMENT = "segment"

    55→        const val EXTRA_PROGRESS = "progress"

    58→
    59→        // 完成广播

    61→        const val EXTRA_SUCCESS = "success"
    62→        const val EXTRA_ERROR = "error"

    75→
    76→    // 服务状态

    78→    val serviceState: StateFlow<ServiceState> = _serviceState.asStateFlow()
    79→

    94→    override fun onStartCommand(intent: Intent?, flags: Int, startId: Int): Int {
    95→        when (intent?.action) {
    96→            ACTION_START -> {
    97→                val videoPath = intent.getStringExtra(EXTRA_VIDEO_PATH)
    98→                val videoName = intent.getStringExtra(EXTRA_VIDEO_NAME) ?: "视频"
    99→                if (videoPath != null) {
   100→                    startTranscription(videoPath, videoName)
   101→                }
   102→            }

   104→                cancelTranscription()

   106→        }

   110→    /**
   111→     * 开始转录
   112→     */
   113→    private fun startTranscription(videoPath: String, videoName: String) {
   114→        Log.d(TAG, "Starting transcription for: $videoPath")
   115→
   116→        if (currentJob?.isActive == true) {
   117→            Log.w(TAG, "Transcription already running")
   118→            return
   119→        }
   120→
   121→        // 启动前台服务
   122→        startForeground(NOTIFICATION_ID, createProgressNotification(videoName, 0, 0, "正在准备..."))
   123→
   124→        currentJob = serviceScope.launch {
   125→            try {
   126→                _serviceState.value = ServiceState.Transcribing(0, 0, 0, "正在准备...")
   127→
   128→                val config = aiConfigStore.config.first()
   129→                val videoFile = File(videoPath)
   130→
   131→                // 检查 API Key
   132→                val hasGroqKey = config.groqApiKey.isNotBlank() ||
   133→                                 (config.provider == "groq" && config.apiKey.isNotBlank())
   134→
   135→                if (!hasGroqKey) {
   136→                    sendErrorBroadcast("❌ 请先配置 Groq API Key\n\n获取 API Key：https://console.groq.com/keys")
   137→                    _serviceState.value = ServiceState.Error("请先配置 Groq API Key")
   138→                    stopForeground(STOP_FOREGROUND_REMOVE)
   139→                    stopSelf()
   140→                    return@launch
   141→                }
   142→
   143→                // 执行转录 - 使用用户指定的转录语言（如果设置了）
   144→                val transcribeLang = config.transcribeLanguage.takeIf { it.isNotBlank() }
   145→                val result = ffmpegSegmentedService.transcribeWithSegments(
   146→                    videoFile,
   147→                    config,
   148→                    transcribeLang,
   149→                    onProgress = { segment, total, progress, message, remainingSeconds ->
   150→                        updateProgress(videoName, segment, total, progress, message)
   151→                        sendProgressBroadcast(segment, total, progress, message, remainingSeconds)
   152→                        _serviceState.value = ServiceState.Transcribing(
   153→                            segment, total, progress, message
   154→                        )
   155→                    }
   156→                )
   157→
   158→                // 转录完成
   159→                if (result != null && result.success) {
   160→                    val base = videoPath.substringBeforeLast(".")
   161→                    val vttPath = base + ".vtt"
   162→                    val wtsPath = base + ".wordts.json"
   163→
   164→                    // 如果字幕文件还不存在（可能是其他转录任务创建的），保存它们
   165→                    if (!File(vttPath).exists()) {
   166→                        saveSubtitles(result, vttPath, wtsPath)
   167→                    }
   168→
   169→                    sendCompletedBroadcast(true, result.detectedLang, result.text)
   170→                    _serviceState.value = ServiceState.Completed(
   171→                        result.detectedLang,
   172→                        result.text
   173→                    )
   174→
   175→                    updateNotificationComplete(videoName)
   176→                    delay(3000) // 显示完成通知3秒
   177→                    stopForeground(STOP_FOREGROUND_REMOVE)
   178→                    stopSelf()
   179→                } else {
   180→                    val error = result?.error ?: "未知错误"
   181→                    sendErrorBroadcast(error)
   182→                    _serviceState.value = ServiceState.Error(error)
   183→                    stopForeground(STOP_FOREGROUND_REMOVE)
   184→                    stopSelf()
   185→                }
   186→
   187→            } catch (e: Exception) {
   188→                Log.e(TAG, "Transcription error", e)
   189→                val error = "转录失败: ${e.message}"
   190→                sendErrorBroadcast(error)
   191→                _serviceState.value = ServiceState.Error(error)
   192→                stopForeground(STOP_FOREGROUND_REMOVE)

   210→    /**
   211→     * 保存字幕文件
   212→     */
   213→    private suspend fun saveSubtitles(
   214→        result: WhisperResult,
   215→        vttPath: String,
   216→        wtsPath: String
   217→    ) = withContext(Dispatchers.IO) {
   218→        val vttBuilder = StringBuilder("WEBVTT\n\n")
   219→        val allWordTimings = mutableListOf<WordTimestamp>()
   220→
   221→        if (result.words.isNotEmpty()) {
   222→            var curWords = mutableListOf<WordTimestamp>()
   223→            for (wt in result.words) {
   224→                curWords.add(wt)
   225→                if (wt.w.trim().matches(Regex(".*[.!?。！？]$")) && curWords.isNotEmpty()) {
   226→                    val sentText = curWords.joinToString(" ") { it.w }
   227→                    val sStart = curWords.first().s
   228→                    val sEnd = curWords.last().e
   229→                    vttBuilder.append("${VttParser.formatVtt(sStart)} --> ${VttParser.formatVtt(sEnd)}\n$sentText\n\n")
   230→                    allWordTimings.addAll(curWords)
   231→                    curWords = mutableListOf()
   232→                }
   233→            }
   234→            if (curWords.isNotEmpty()) {
   235→                val sentText = curWords.joinToString(" ") { it.w }
   236→                val sStart = curWords.first().s
   237→                val sEnd = curWords.last().e
   238→                vttBuilder.append("${VttParser.formatVtt(sStart)} --> ${VttParser.formatVtt(sEnd)}\n$sentText\n\n")
   239→                allWordTimings.addAll(curWords)
   240→            }
   241→        }
   242→
   243→        File(vttPath).writeText(vttBuilder.toString())
   244→        if (allWordTimings.isNotEmpty()) {
   245→            val json = Json { ignoreUnknownKeys = true }
   246→            File(wtsPath).writeText(json.encodeToString(ListSerializer(WordTimestamp.serializer()), allWordTimings))
   247→        }
   248→
   249→        Log.d(TAG, "Subtitles saved: ${allWordTimings.size} words")
   250→    }

   321→        val openIntent = Intent(this, com.multilanglearner.MainActivity::class.java).apply {

    12→/**
    13→ * 分段转录服务 - 处理大视频文件的转录
    14→ * 对于超大文件，提供用户友好的处理建议
    15→ */
    16→@Singleton
    17→class SegmentedWhisperService @Inject constructor(
    18→    private val whisperService: WhisperService
    19→) {
    20→    companion object {
    21→        private const val TAG = "SegmentedWhisper"
    22→        // Groq API 文件大小限制
    23→        private const val MAX_FILE_SIZE = 100 * 1024 * 1024L // 100MB
    24→        // 建议分段处理的文件大小阈值
    25→        private const val SUGGEST_SEGMENT_SIZE = 150 * 1024 * 1024L // 150MB
    26→        // 最小文件大小
    27→        private const val MIN_FILE_SIZE = 1024L // 1KB
    28→    }
    29→
    30→    private val serviceScope = CoroutineScope(Dispatchers.IO + SupervisorJob())
    31→
    32→    /**
    33→     * 转录视频文件 - 支持大文件处理
    34→     * @param videoFile 视频文件
    35→     * @param config AI配置
    36→     * @param onProgress 进度回调
    37→     * @return 转录结果
    38→     */
    39→    suspend fun transcribeSegmented(
    40→        videoFile: File,
    41→        config: AIConfig,
    42→        onProgress: (Int, Int, Int, String) -> Unit = { _, _, _, _ -> }
    43→    ): WhisperResult? = withContext(Dispatchers.IO) {
    44→        try {
    45→            val fileSize = videoFile.length()
    46→            val fileSizeMB = String.format("%.2f", fileSize / 1024.0 / 1024.0)
    47→
    48→            Log.d(TAG, "Starting transcription: file=${videoFile.name}, size=$fileSizeMB MB")
    49→            onProgress(1, 1, 10, "准备转录...")
    50→
    51→            // 检查最小文件大小
    52→            if (fileSize < MIN_FILE_SIZE) {
    53→                Log.e(TAG, "File too small: $fileSize bytes")
    54→                return@withContext WhisperResult(
    55→                    success = false,
    56→                    error = "❌ 视频文件过小\n\n文件大小: ${fileSize / 1024} KB\n最小要求: 1 KB\n\n请使用包含音频内容的有效视频文件"
    57→                )
    58→            }
    59→
    60→            // 获取视频时长
    61→            val duration = getVideoDuration(videoFile)
    62→            if (duration == null) {
    63→                Log.e(TAG, "Failed to get video duration")
    64→                return@withContext WhisperResult(
    65→                    success = false,
    66→                    error = "❌ 无法读取视频信息\n\n请确保视频文件完整且可播放\n\n支持的格式: MP4, WebM, MKV"
    67→                )
    68→            }
    69→
    70→            val durationMinutes = String.format("%.1f", duration / 60.0)
    71→            Log.d(TAG, "Video duration: ${durationMinutes} minutes (${duration} seconds)")
    72→
    73→            // 根据文件大小决定处理方式
    74→            when {
    75→                fileSize <= MAX_FILE_SIZE -> {
    76→                    // 文件在限制内，直接转录
    77→                    Log.d(TAG, "File within API limit, transcribing directly")
    78→                    onProgress(1, 1, 20, "文件大小合适，直接转录...")
    79→                    whisperService.transcribeGroq(videoFile, config)
    80→                }
    81→
    82→                fileSize <= SUGGEST_SEGMENT_SIZE -> {
    83→                    // 文件略超限制，尝试直接转录（Groq 可能支持更大文件）
    84→                    Log.d(TAG, "File slightly exceeds documented limit, attempting direct transcription")
    85→                    onProgress(1, 1, 20, "尝试直接转录...")
    86→
    87→                    val result = whisperService.transcribeGroq(videoFile, config)
    88→
    89→                    if (result?.success == true) {
    90→                        result
    91→                    } else {
    92→                        // 如果直接转录失败，提供详细建议
    93→                        val errorMsg = result?.error ?: "未知错误"
    94→                        WhisperResult(
    95→                            success = false,
    96→                            error = "❌ 文件过大，转录失败\n\n$fileSizeMB MB 超过了 API 限制\n\n建议解决方案：\n\n" +
    97→                                "Option 1: Split with FFmpeg on PC\n" +
    98→                                "1. Download FFmpeg: https://ffmpeg.org\n" +
    99→                                "2. Extract segments:\n" +
   100→                                "   ffmpeg -i input.mp4 -t 300 part1.mp4\n" +
   101→                                "   ffmpeg -i input.mp4 -ss 295 -t 300 part2.mp4\n" +
   102→                                "3. Transcribe each part separately\n\n" +
   103→                                "Option 2: Compress video\n" +
   104→                                "ffmpeg -i input.mp4 -b:a 64k output.mp4\n\n" +
   105→                                "Error: $errorMsg"
   106→                        )
   107→                    }
   108→                }
   109→
   110→                else -> {
   111→                    // 文件太大，提供详细指导
   112→                    Log.d(TAG, "File too large for direct processing")
   113→                    WhisperResult(
   114→                        success = false,
   115→                        error = "❌ 文件过大，无法直接转录\n\n" +
   116→                            "文件信息：\n" +
   117→                            "Size: $fileSizeMB MB\n" +
   118→                            "Duration: ${durationMinutes} minutes\n\n" +
   119→                            "Solutions:\n\n" +
   120→                            "[Recommended] Option 1: Split with FFmpeg on PC\n" +
   121→                            "1. Install FFmpeg: https://ffmpeg.org\n" +
   122→                            "2. Extract 5-minute segments:\n" +
   123→                            "   ffmpeg -i video.mp4 -t 300 segment_01.mp4\n" +
   124→                            "   ffmpeg -i video.mp4 -ss 295 -t 305 segment_02.mp4\n" +
   125→                            "3. Import each segment to transcribe\n\n" +
   126→                            "Option 2: Compress video\n" +
   127→                            "ffmpeg -i video.mp4 -c:v libx264 -crf 28 -c:a aac -b:a 64k output.mp4\n\n" +
   128→                            "Option 3: Extract audio only\n" +
   129→                            "ffmpeg -i video.mp4 -vn -b:a 64k audio.mp4"
   130→                    )
   131→                }
   132→            }
   133→
   134→        } catch (e: Exception) {
   135→            Log.e(TAG, "Transcription error", e)
   136→            WhisperResult(
   137→                success = false,
   138→                error = "❌ 转录失败\n\n${e.message}"
   139→            )
   140→        }
   141→    }

   143→    /**
   144→     * 获取视频时长（秒）- 使用 Android 原生 API
   145→     */
   146→    private fun getVideoDuration(videoFile: File): Double? {
   147→        val retriever = MediaMetadataRetriever()
   148→        return try {
   149→            retriever.setDataSource(videoFile.absolutePath)
   150→            val durationStr = retriever.extractMetadata(MediaMetadataRetriever.METADATA_KEY_DURATION)
   151→            durationStr?.toDoubleOrNull()?.let { it / 1000.0 }
   152→        } catch (e: Exception) {
   153→            Log.e(TAG, "Error getting video duration", e)
   154→            null
   155→        } finally {
   156→            try {
   157→                retriever.release()
   158→            } catch (e: Exception) {
   159→                Log.e(TAG, "Error releasing retriever", e)
   160→            }
   161→        }
   162→    }
   163→
   164→    /**
   165→     * 获取视频文件的详细信息
   166→     */
   167→    fun getVideoInfo(videoFile: File): VideoInfo? {
   168→        val retriever = MediaMetadataRetriever()
   169→        return try {
   170→            retriever.setDataSource(videoFile.absolutePath)
   171→
   172→            val duration = retriever.extractMetadata(MediaMetadataRetriever.METADATA_KEY_DURATION)
   173→                ?.toDoubleOrNull()?.div(1000.0)
   174→            val width = retriever.extractMetadata(MediaMetadataRetriever.METADATA_KEY_VIDEO_WIDTH)
   175→                ?.toIntOrNull()
   176→            val height = retriever.extractMetadata(MediaMetadataRetriever.METADATA_KEY_VIDEO_HEIGHT)
   177→                ?.toIntOrNull()
   178→            val bitrate = retriever.extractMetadata(MediaMetadataRetriever.METADATA_KEY_BITRATE)
   179→                ?.toIntOrNull()
   180→            val rotation = retriever.extractMetadata(MediaMetadataRetriever.METADATA_KEY_VIDEO_ROTATION)
   181→                ?.toIntOrNull() ?: 0
   182→
   183→            VideoInfo(
   184→                duration = duration,
   185→                width = width,
   186→                height = height,
   187→                bitrate = bitrate,
   188→                rotation = rotation,
   189→                fileSize = videoFile.length()
   190→            )
   191→        } catch (e: Exception) {
   192→            Log.e(TAG, "Error getting video info", e)
   193→            null
   194→        } finally {
   195→            try {
   196→                retriever.release()
   197→            } catch (e: Exception) {
   198→                Log.e(TAG, "Error releasing retriever", e)
   199→            }
   200→        }
   201→    }
   202→}
   203→
   204→/**
   205→ * 视频信息数据类
   206→ */
   207→data class VideoInfo(
   208→    val duration: Double?,      // 时长（秒）
   209→    val width: Int?,            // 宽度
   210→    val height: Int?,           // 高度
   211→    val bitrate: Int?,          // 比特率
   212→    val rotation: Int,          // 旋转角度
   213→    val fileSize: Long          // 文件大小
   214→)

     6→import kotlinx.serialization.Serializable

     9→import okhttp3.MediaType.Companion.toMediaType

    14→import javax.inject.Inject

    16→
    17→@Serializable
    18→data class WhisperResult(
    19→    val success: Boolean,
    20→    val text: String = "",
    21→    val words: List<WordTimestamp> = emptyList(),
    22→    val detectedLang: String = "",
    23→    val error: String = ""
    24→)
    25→
    26→@Singleton
    27→class WhisperService @Inject constructor() {
    28→    private val client = OkHttpClient.Builder()
    29→        .connectTimeout(15, TimeUnit.SECONDS)  // 减少连接超时，加快重试
    30→        .readTimeout(600, TimeUnit.SECONDS)    // 增加读取超时，支持长音频
    31→        .writeTimeout(120, TimeUnit.SECONDS)   // 增加写入超时
    32→        .retryOnConnectionFailure(true)        // 启用自动重试
    33→        .build()
    34→
    35→    private val json = Json { ignoreUnknownKeys = true }
    36→
    37→    // Groq API 文件大小限制（增加到 100MB，Groq 实际支持更大）
    38→    private val MAX_FILE_SIZE = 100 * 1024 * 1024L
    39→    private val MIN_FILE_SIZE = 1024L // 最小 1KB，避免空文件或太小的文件
    40→
    41→    // 最大重试次数
    42→    private val MAX_RETRIES = 3
    43→
    44→    /**
    45→     * Transcribe audio via Groq Whisper API
    46→     * 优先使用 groqApiKey，其次使用 provider 为 groq 时的 apiKey
    47→     * 添加自动重试机制
    48→     */
    49→    suspend fun transcribeGroq(audioFile: File, config: AIConfig, lang: String? = null): WhisperResult? {
    50→        // 自动重试逻辑
    51→        var lastError: Exception? = null
    52→        repeat(MAX_RETRIES) { attempt ->
    53→            if (attempt > 0) {
    54→                Log.d("WhisperService", "Retry $attempt/$MAX_RETRIES")
    55→                kotlinx.coroutines.delay(2000L * attempt) // 递增延迟
    56→            }
    57→
    58→            val result = transcribeGroqInternal(audioFile, config, lang)
    59→            if (result?.success == true) {
    60→                return result
    61→            }
    62→            lastError = Exception(result?.error ?: "Unknown error")
    63→        }
    64→
    65→        // 所有重试都失败
    66→        return WhisperResult(
    67→            success = false,
    68→            error = "❌ 转录失败（已重试 $MAX_RETRIES 次）\n\n${lastError?.message ?: "未知错误"}\n\n建议：检查网络连接和 API Key 配置"
    69→        )
    70→    }
    71→
    72→    /**
    73→     * 内部转录实现
    74→     */
    75→    private suspend fun transcribeGroqInternal(audioFile: File, config: AIConfig, lang: String? = null): WhisperResult? {
    76→        // 获取 Groq API Key：优先使用专门的 groqApiKey，其次检查 provider 是否为 groq
    77→        val apiKey = config.groqApiKey.takeIf { it.isNotBlank() }
    78→            ?: (config.apiKey.takeIf { config.provider == "groq" && it.isNotBlank() })
    79→            ?: return WhisperResult(success = false, error = "❌ 未配置 Groq API Key\n\n请前往「AI 设置」配置 Groq API Key。\n获取 API Key：https://console.groq.com/keys")
    80→
    81→        val whisperModel = config.whisperModel.ifBlank { "whisper-large-v3-turbo" }
    82→
    83→        // 检查文件大小
    84→        val fileSize = audioFile.length()
    85→        Log.d("WhisperService", "File size: $fileSize bytes, max: $MAX_FILE_SIZE")
    86→
    87→        // 检查最小文件大小
    88→        if (fileSize < MIN_FILE_SIZE) {

    90→            return WhisperResult(

    93→            )
    94→        }
    95→
    96→        if (fileSize > MAX_FILE_SIZE) {
    97→            val sizeMB = String.format("%.2f", fileSize / 1024.0 / 1024.0)
    98→            val maxMB = String.format("%.2f", MAX_FILE_SIZE / 1024.0 / 1024.0)
    99→            Log.e("WhisperService", "File too large: $sizeMB MB (max: $maxMB MB)")

   103→            )
   104→        }
   105→
   106→        Log.d("WhisperService", "Starting transcription with Groq Whisper: model=$whisperModel, file=${audioFile.name}, size=$fileSize")
   107→
   108→        val bodyBuilder = MultipartBody.Builder().setType(MultipartBody.FORM)

   116→
   117→        lang?.let { bodyBuilder.addFormDataPart("language", it) }

   119→        val request = Request.Builder()

   121→            .addHeader("Authorization", "Bearer $apiKey")
   122→            .post(bodyBuilder.build())
   123→            .build()
   124→
   125→        return try {
   126→            Log.d("WhisperService", "Sending request to Groq API...")
   127→            val response = client.newCall(request).execute()
   128→
   129→            Log.d("WhisperService", "Response code: ${response.code}")
   130→
   131→            if (response.code != 200) {
   132→                val errorBody = response.body?.string() ?: "Unknown error"
   133→                Log.e("WhisperService", "API error: $errorBody")
   134→
   135→                // 解析错误信息
   136→                val errorMsg = try {
   137→                    val errorJson = json.parseToJsonElement(errorBody).jsonObject
   138→                    val errObj = errorJson["error"]?.jsonObject
   139→                    val errMsg = errObj?.get("message")?.jsonPrimitive?.contentOrNull
   140→                    val errType = errObj?.get("type")?.jsonPrimitive?.contentOrNull
   141→                    val errCode = errObj?.get("code")?.jsonPrimitive?.contentOrNull
   142→
   143→                    when {
   144→                        errMsg?.contains("invalid_api_key", ignoreCase = true) == true ||
   145→                        errMsg?.contains("Unauthorized", ignoreCase = true) == true ||
   146→                        response.code == 401 ->
   147→                            "❌ API Key 无效\n\n请检查 Groq API Key 是否正确配置\n\n获取 API Key：https://console.groq.com/keys"

   151→                        response.code == 429 ->

   154→                        errMsg?.contains("banned", ignoreCase = true) == true ||
   155→                        response.code == 403 ->
   156→                            "❌ 转录被禁止\n\n${errMsg ?: "访问被限制"}\n\n可能原因：\n1. API Key 被禁用\n2. 账户存在违规行为\n3. 内容不符合使用条款"
   157→                        else -> "❌ 转录失败 ($response.code)\n\n${errMsg ?: errorBody}"
   158→                    }

   166→            val body = response.body?.string() ?: return WhisperResult(success = false, error = "空响应")
   167→            Log.d("WhisperService", "Response length: ${body.length}")
   168→            Log.d("WhisperService", "Response body preview: ${body.take(500)}")

   173→                return WhisperResult(

   176→                )
   177→            }

   179→            try {

   206→                WhisperResult(

   208→                    error = "❌ 响应解析失败\n\nGroq API 返回了无法解析的响应。\n\n错误: ${e.message}\n\n响应内容：\n${body.take(500)}"
   209→                )
   210→            }

   226→                .header("Content-Type", "application/json")

   249→                return@withContext Result.success(VideoDownloadInfo(

   382→     * 支持 BV 号和 b23.tv 短链接
   383→     */
   384→    private fun extractBVID(url: String): String? {
   385→        val bvPattern = Regex("(BV[a-zA-Z0-9]{10})")
   386→        val match = bvPattern.find(url)
   387→        return match?.groupValues?.get(1)
   388→    }

   390→    /**
   391→     * 提取 YouTube 视频 ID
   392→     */
   393→    private fun extractYoutubeVideoId(url: String): String? {
   394→        // 支持 youtube.com/watch?v= 和 youtu.be/ 格式
   395→        val patterns = listOf(
   396→            Regex("(?:youtube\\.com/watch\\?v=|youtu\\.be/)([a-zA-Z0-9_-]{11})"),
   397→            Regex("youtube\\.com/embed/([a-zA-Z0-9_-]{11})")
   398→        )
   399→
   400→        for (pattern in patterns) {
   401→            val match = pattern.find(url)
   402→            if (match != null) {
   403→                return match.groupValues[1]
   404→            }
   405→        }
   406→        return null
   407→    }

   432→    /**
   433→     * 使用 B站官方 API 解析
   434→     * 参考 bilibili-api (Kotlin): https://github.com/czp3009/bilibili-api
   435→     *
   436→     * API 端点：
   437→     * - 视频信息: https://api.bilibili.com/x/web-interface/view?bvid={bvid}
   438→     * - 播放地址: https://api.bilibili.com/x/player/playurl?bvid={bvid}&cid={cid}
   439→     */
   440→    private suspend fun fetchBilibiliOfficialAPI(url: String): Result<VideoDownloadInfo> = withContext(Dispatchers.IO) {
   441→        try {
   442→            // 1. 提取 BV 号
   443→            val bvid = extractBVID(url)
   444→            if (bvid == null) {
   445→                return@withContext Result.failure(Exception("无法提取BV号"))
   446→            }
   447→            Log.d(TAG, "BV ID: $bvid")
   448→
   449→            // 获取Cookie（如果有配置）
   450→            val cookie = getCookieForPlatform(url)
   451→            if (cookie != null) {
   452→                Log.d(TAG, "Using configured cookies for Bilibili API")
   453→            }
   454→
   455→            // 2. 获取视频信息（获取 cid）
   456→            val infoUrl = "https://api.bilibili.com/x/web-interface/view?bvid=$bvid"
   457→            val infoRequestBuilder = Request.Builder()
   458→                .url(infoUrl)
   459→                .header("User-Agent", getUserAgent())
   460→                .header("Referer", "https://www.bilibili.com/")
   461→
   462→            // 添加Cookie
   463→            if (cookie != null) {
   464→                infoRequestBuilder.header("Cookie", cookie)
   465→            }
   466→
   467→            val infoRequest = infoRequestBuilder.build()
   468→
   469→            val infoResponse = client.newCall(infoRequest).execute()
   470→            val infoBody = infoResponse.body?.string() ?: return@withContext Result.failure(IOException("空响应"))
   471→            val infoJson = JSONObject(infoBody)
   472→
   473→            if (infoJson.optInt("code", -1) != 0) {
   474→                val errorMsg = infoJson.optString("message")
   475→                // 检查是否是需要Cookie的错误
   476→                if (errorMsg.contains("登录") || errorMsg.contains("会员") || errorMsg.contains("权限")) {
   477→                    return@withContext Result.failure(
   478→                        Exception("❌ 需要登录或会员权限\n\n错误信息: $errorMsg\n\n解决方案：\n• 在设置中配置B站Cookie（SESSDATA）\n• 或使用「导入本地视频」功能")
   479→                    )
   480→                }
   481→                return@withContext Result.failure(Exception("API错误: $errorMsg"))
   482→            }
   483→
   484→            val data = infoJson.getJSONObject("data")
   485→            val cid = data.optLong("cid")
   486→            val title = data.optString("title")
   487→            val cover = data.optString("pic").replace("\\/\\\\/", "/")
   488→            val duration = data.optInt("duration")
   489→            val author = data.optJSONObject("owner")?.optString("name") ?: "未知UP主"
   490→
   491→            Log.d(TAG, "Video info: $title, cid=$cid")
   492→
   493→            // 3. 获取播放URL - 优先使用DASH格式（支持ffmpeg合并音视频）
   494→            val playUrl = "https://api.bilibili.com/x/player/playurl?bvid=$bvid&cid=$cid&qn=80&fnval=16&fnver=0&fourk=1"
   495→            val playRequestBuilder = Request.Builder()
   496→                .url(playUrl)
   497→                .header("User-Agent", getUserAgent())
   498→                .header("Referer", "https://www.bilibili.com/")
   499→
   500→            if (cookie != null) {
   501→                playRequestBuilder.header("Cookie", cookie)
   502→            }
   503→
   504→            val playRequest = playRequestBuilder.build()
   505→            val playResponse = client.newCall(playRequest).execute()
   506→            val playBody = playResponse.body?.string() ?: return@withContext Result.failure(IOException("空响应"))
   507→            val playJson = JSONObject(playBody)
   508→
   509→            if (playJson.optInt("code", -1) != 0) {
   510→                val errorMsg = playJson.optString("message")
   511→                if (errorMsg.contains("登录") || errorMsg.contains("会员") || errorMsg.contains("权限")) {
   512→                    return@withContext Result.failure(
   513→                        Exception("❌ 需要登录或会员权限\n\n错误信息: $errorMsg\n\n解决方案：\n• 在设置中配置B站Cookie（SESSDATA）\n• 或使用「导入本地视频」功能")
   514→                    )
   515→                }
   516→                return@withContext Result.failure(Exception("获取播放URL失败: $errorMsg"))
   517→            }
   518→
   519→            val playData = playJson.getJSONObject("data")
   520→            val dash = playData.optJSONObject("dash")
   521→            val durl = playData.optJSONArray("durl")
   522→
   523→            var videoUrl: String? = null
   524→            var audioUrl: String? = null
   525→
   526→            if (durl != null && durl.length() > 0) {
   527→                // MP4格式（包含音视频）
   528→                videoUrl = durl.getJSONObject(0).optString("url")
   529→            } else if (dash != null) {
   530→                // DASH格式 - 需要分别下载音频和视频
   531→                val dashVideo = dash.optJSONArray("video")
   532→                val dashAudio = dash.optJSONArray("audio")
   533→
   534→                if (dashVideo != null && dashVideo.length() > 0) {
   535→                    videoUrl = dashVideo.getJSONObject(0).optString("baseUrl")
   536→                    // 尝试选择最佳音频质量
   537→                    if (dashAudio != null && dashAudio.length() > 0) {
   538→                        audioUrl = dashAudio.getJSONObject(0).optString("baseUrl")
   539→                    }
   540→                    Log.d(TAG, "DASH format detected: video and audio will be merged")
   541→                }
   542→            }
   543→
   544→            if (videoUrl != null) {
   545→                Log.d(TAG, "Got video URL from official API, cookies used: ${cookie != null}, hasAudio: ${audioUrl != null}")
   546→                return@withContext Result.success(VideoDownloadInfo(
   547→                    title = title,
   548→                    downloadUrl = videoUrl,
   549→                    cover = cover,
   550→                    duration = duration.toLong(),
   551→                    author = author,
   552→                    cookies = cookie,
   553→                    platform = VideoPlatform.BILIBILI,
   554→                    audioUrl = audioUrl
   555→                ))
   556→            }
   557→
   558→            Result.failure(Exception("无法获取播放地址"))
   559→
   560→        } catch (e: Exception) {
   561→            Log.e(TAG, "Official API error", e)
   562→            Result.failure(e)
   563→        }
   564→    }

   619→     * 使用指定 API 获取 B站视频信息

   621→    private suspend fun fetchBilibiliInfoWithApi(api: BilibiliApiConfig): Result<VideoDownloadInfo> = withContext(Dispatchers.IO) {
   622→        try {
   623→            val request = Request.Builder()
   624→                .url(api.endpoint)
   625→                .header("User-Agent", getUserAgent())
   626→                .header("Referer", "https://www.bilibili.com/")
   627→                .build()
   628→
   629→            val response = client.newCall(request).execute()
   630→            val responseBody = response.body?.string() ?: return@withContext Result.failure(IOException("空响应"))
   631→
   632→            Log.d(TAG, "[${api.name}] Response: ${responseBody.take(300)}")
   633→
   634→            // 检查是否是HTML响应（API可能失效）
   635→            if (responseBody.trim().startsWith("<!DOCTYPE") || responseBody.trim().startsWith("<html")) {
   636→                Log.w(TAG, "[${api.name}] API returned HTML, may be invalid")
   637→                return@withContext Result.failure(Exception("API返回HTML，可能已失效"))
   638→            }
   639→
   640→            val json = JSONObject(responseBody)
   641→
   642→            // 尝试多种返回格式解析
   643→
   644→            // 格式1: {data: {url: "...", title: "..."}}
   645→            if (json.has("data")) {
   646→                val data = json.getJSONObject("data")
   647→                val videoUrl = data.optJSONArray("url")?.optString(0)
   648→                    ?: data.optString("url")
   649→                    ?: data.optString("video_url")
   650→                    ?: data.optString("playurl")
   651→                    ?: data.optString("download_url")
   652→
   653→                val title = data.optString("title")
   654→                    ?: data.optString("name")
   655→                    ?: "B站视频"
   656→
   657→                if (videoUrl.isNotEmpty() && videoUrl.startsWith("http")) {
   658→                    Log.d(TAG, "[${api.name}] Got video URL: $videoUrl")
   659→                    return@withContext Result.success(VideoDownloadInfo(
   660→                        title = title,
   661→                        downloadUrl = videoUrl,
   662→                        cover = data.optString("pic")
   663→                            ?: data.optString("cover")
   664→                            ?: data.optString("img"),
   665→                        duration = data.optLong("duration", 0L) / 1000,
   666→                        author = data.optString("author")
   667→                            ?: data.optString("uploader")
   668→                            ?: data.optString("owner")?.let { ownerJson ->
   669→                                try { JSONObject(ownerJson).optString("name") } catch(e: Exception) { null }
   670→                            }
   671→                    ))
   672→                }
   673→            }
   674→
   675→            // 格式2: {url: "...", title: "..."}
   676→            val directUrl = json.optString("url")
   677→                ?: json.optString("video_url")
   678→                ?: json.optString("playurl")
   679→                ?: json.optString("download_url")
   680→
   681→            if (directUrl.startsWith("http")) {
   682→                val title = json.optString("title") ?: "B站视频"
   683→                Log.d(TAG, "[${api.name}] Got direct URL: $directUrl")
   684→                return@withContext Result.success(VideoDownloadInfo(
   685→                    title = title,
   686→                    downloadUrl = directUrl,
   687→                    cover = json.optString("pic") ?: json.optString("cover"),
   688→                    duration = json.optLong("duration", 0L) / 1000,
   689→                    author = json.optString("author")
   690→                ))
   691→            }
   692→
   693→            // 格式3: {code: 200, data: {url: "..."}} 或 {code: 200, url: "..."}
   694→            if (json.optInt("code") == 200 || json.optInt("code") == 1) {
   695→                val nestedData = json.optJSONObject("data")
   696→                val videoUrl = nestedData?.optString("url")
   697→                    ?: nestedData?.optString("video_url")
   698→                    ?: json.optString("url")
   699→                    ?: json.optString("video_url")
   700→
   701→                if (videoUrl?.startsWith("http") == true) {
   702→                    val title = nestedData?.optString("title")
   703→                        ?: json.optString("title")
   704→                        ?: "B站视频"
   705→                    return@withContext Result.success(VideoDownloadInfo(
   706→                        title = title,
   707→                        downloadUrl = videoUrl,
   708→                        cover = nestedData?.optString("pic") ?: json.optString("pic"),
   709→                        duration = nestedData?.optLong("duration", 0L)?.div(1000) ?: 0L
   710→                    ))
   711→                }
   712→            }
   713→
   714→            // 格式4: {msg: "...", code: ...} - 可能包含错误信息
   715→            val msg = json.optString("msg") ?: json.optString("message")
   716→            if (msg.isNotEmpty()) {
   717→                return@withContext Result.failure(Exception("API返回: $msg"))
   718→            }
   719→
   720→            // 无法解析
   721→            return@withContext Result.failure(Exception("无法解析API响应格式"))
   722→
   723→        } catch (e: Exception) {
   724→            Log.e(TAG, "[${api.name}] Request failed", e)
   725→            Result.failure(e)
   726→        }
   727→    }

1→package com.multilanglearner.domain.util
     2→
     3→import com.multilanglearner.domain.model.WordTimestamp
     4→
     5→/**
     6→ * Word-level timestamp alignment - ported from main.js generate-subtitle handler.
     7→ * Matches displayed words to API word timestamps using fuzzy matching.
     8→ */
     9→object WordAligner {
    10→    private val CLEAN_REGEX = Regex("[^\\p{L}\\p{M}\\p{N}'-]")
    11→
    12→    /**
    13→     * Find word timestamps for the current subtitle cue.
    14→     * Filters wordTimings to those within the cue's time range,
    15→     * then maps displayed words to API words via fuzzy match.
    16→     */
    17→    fun alignWords(
    18→        displayedWords: List<String>,
    19→        allTimings: List<WordTimestamp>,
    20→        cueStartSec: Double,
    21→        cueEndSec: Double
    22→    ): List<WordTimestamp?> {
    23→        val subWords = allTimings.filter { it.s >= cueStartSec - 0.1 && it.s <= cueEndSec + 0.3 }
    24→        if (subWords.isEmpty()) return List(displayedWords.size) { null }
    25→
    26→        val result = mutableListOf<WordTimestamp?>()
    27→        var wtIdx = 0
    28→        for (dw in displayedWords) {
    29→            val clean = dw.trim().lowercase().replace(CLEAN_REGEX, "")
    30→            var matched: WordTimestamp? = null
    31→            for (k in wtIdx until subWords.size) {
    32→                val wtWord = subWords[k].w.trim().lowercase().replace(CLEAN_REGEX, "")
    33→                if (wtWord == clean || clean.startsWith(wtWord) || wtWord.startsWith(clean)) {
    34→                    matched = subWords[k]
    35→                    wtIdx = k + 1
    36→                    break
    37→                }
    38→            }
    39→            result.add(matched)
    40→        }
    41→        return result
    42→    }
    43→}
    44→

1→package com.multilanglearner.domain.util
     2→
     3→import com.multilanglearner.domain.model.SubtitleCue
     4→
     5→/**
     6→ * VTT subtitle parser - ported from renderer.js parseVTT()
     7→ * Handles YouTube auto-generated subtitle quirks:
     8→ * - Skips ultra-short entries (<50ms, transition frames)
     9→ * - Takes last non-empty text line (YouTube dual-line format)
    10→ * - Merges consecutive identical text entries
    11→ */
    12→object VttParser {
    13→    private val TIMESTAMP_REGEX = Regex(
    14→        """(\d{2}):(\d{2}):(\d{2})\.(\d{3})\s*-->\s*(\d{2}):(\d{2}):(\d{2})\.(\d{3})"""
    15→    )
    16→
    17→    fun parse(vttContent: String): List<SubtitleCue> {
    18→        val raw = mutableListOf<SubtitleCue>()
    19→        val blocks = vttContent.replace("\r\n", "\n").split(Regex("\n\n+"))
    20→        var index = 0
    21→
    22→        for (block in blocks) {
    23→            val lines = block.trim().split("\n")
    24→            for (i in lines.indices) {
    25→                val match = TIMESTAMP_REGEX.find(lines[i]) ?: continue
    26→                val startMs = parseTimestamp(match, 1)
    27→                val endMs = parseTimestamp(match, 5)
    28→                // Skip ultra-short entries (YouTube transition frames)
    29→                if (endMs - startMs < 50) break
    30→                // Take last non-empty text line (YouTube dual-line: new content is last)
    31→                val textLines = lines.drop(i + 1)
    32→                    .map { it.replace(Regex("<[^>]+>"), "").trim() }
    33→                    .filter { it.isNotEmpty() }
    34→                val text = textLines.lastOrNull() ?: ""
    35→                if (text.isNotEmpty()) {
    36→                    raw.add(SubtitleCue(index++, startMs, endMs, text))
    37→                }
    38→                break
    39→            }
    40→        }
    41→
    42→        // Merge consecutive identical text (dedup)
    43→        val result = mutableListOf<SubtitleCue>()
    44→        for (cue in raw) {
    45→            if (result.isNotEmpty() && result.last().text == cue.text) {
    46→                val last = result.last()
    47→                result[result.lastIndex] = last.copy(endMs = cue.endMs)
    48→            } else {
    49→                result.add(cue)
    50→            }
    51→        }
    52→        return result
    53→    }
    54→
    55→    private fun parseTimestamp(match: MatchResult, startGroup: Int): Long {
    56→        val h = match.groupValues[startGroup].toLong()
    57→        val m = match.groupValues[startGroup + 1].toLong()
    58→        val s = match.groupValues[startGroup + 2].toLong()
    59→        val ms = match.groupValues[startGroup + 3].toLong()
    60→        return h * 3600000 + m * 60000 + s * 1000 + ms
    61→    }
    62→
    63→    /** Format seconds to VTT timestamp HH:MM:SS.mmm */
    64→    fun formatVtt(sec: Double): String {
    65→        val h = (sec / 3600).toInt()
    66→        val m = ((sec % 3600) / 60).toInt()
    67→        val s = sec % 60
    68→        return "%02d:%02d:%06.3f".format(h, m, s)
    69→    }
    70→}

    98→            Log.d(TAG, "Starting segmented transcription: ${videoFile.name}, $fileSizeMB MB")
    99→            onProgress(0, 1, 5, "获取视频信息...", 0)
   100→
   101→            // 获取视频时长和详细信息
   102→            val mediaInfo = getMediaInformation(videoFile)
   103→
   104→            // 尝试解析时长，兼容多种格式
   105→            val duration = try {
   106→                val durationStr = mediaInfo?.getDuration()
   107→                when {
   108→                    durationStr == null -> null
   109→                    durationStr.matches(Regex("\\d+")) -> durationStr.toLongOrNull()?.div(1000.0)
   110→                    durationStr.matches(Regex("\\d+\\.\\d+")) -> durationStr.toDoubleOrNull()
   111→                    else -> {
   112→                        Log.e(TAG, "Invalid duration format: $durationStr")
   113→                        null
   114→                    }
   115→                }
   116→            } catch (e: Exception) {
   117→                Log.e(TAG, "Error parsing duration: $mediaInfo", e)
   118→                null
   119→            }
   120→
   121→            if (duration == null) {
   122→                Log.e(TAG, "Failed to get video duration")
   123→                return@withContext WhisperResult(
   124→                    success = false,
   125→                    error = "无法读取视频时长，请确保视频文件有效。\n\nFFmpeg 错误: ${mediaInfo?.getAllProperties()}"
   126→                )
   127→            }
   128→
   129→            val durationMinutes = String.format("%.1f", duration / 60.0)
   130→            Log.d(TAG, "Video duration: $durationMinutes minutes ($duration seconds), file size: $fileSizeMB MB")
   131→
   132→            // 判断处理策略 - 基于时长而不是文件大小
   133→            return@withContext when {
   134→                duration <= SEGMENTED_TRANSCRIPTION_THRESHOLD && fileSize <= MAX_API_FILE_SIZE -> {
   135→                    // 时长较短且文件在API限制内，直接转录
   136→                    Log.d(TAG, "Direct transcription (duration: ${duration.toInt()}s, lang=$lang)")
   137→                    onProgress(1, 1, 10, "直接转录中...", 0)
   138→                    whisperService.transcribeGroq(videoFile, config, lang)
   139→                }
   140→                else -> {
   141→                    // 时长较长或文件过大，需要分段处理
   142→                    val reason = if (duration > SEGMENTED_TRANSCRIPTION_THRESHOLD) {
   143→                        "video duration exceeds ${SEGMENTED_TRANSCRIPTION_THRESHOLD.toInt()/60} minutes"
   144→                    } else {
   145→                        "file size exceeds ${MAX_API_FILE_SIZE/1024/1024}MB"
   146→                    }
   147→                    Log.d(TAG, "Segmented transcription: $reason")
   148→                    transcribeSegmentedInternal(videoFile, config, duration, lang, onProgress)
   149→                }
   150→            }
   151→
   152→        } catch (e: Exception) {
   153→            Log.e(TAG, "Transcription error", e)
   154→            Log.e(TAG, "Error stack trace: ${e.stackTraceToString()}")
   155→            WhisperResult(
   156→                success = false,
   157→                error = "❌ 转录失败\n\n错误: ${e.message}\n\n详细日志已输出到 logcat"
   158→            )

   161→
   162→    /**
   163→     * 内部分段转录实现 - 增强版（并行处理）
   164→     * 包含重试机制、超时控制、剩余时间估算和并行处理
   165→     */
   166→    private suspend fun transcribeSegmentedInternal(
   167→        videoFile: File,
   168→        config: AIConfig,
   169→        duration: Double,
   170→        lang: String?,
   171→        onProgress: (Int, Int, Int, String, Long) -> Unit
   172→    ): WhisperResult? {
   173→        // 计算分段数量
   174→        val segments = calculateSegments(duration)
   175→        val totalSegments = segments.size
   176→
   177→        Log.d(TAG, "Will process in $totalSegments segments (parallel: $PARALLEL_SEGMENTS)")
   178→        onProgress(0, totalSegments, 10, "准备处理 $totalSegments 个分段...", 0)
   179→
   180→        // 创建临时目录
   181→        val tempDir = File(context.cacheDir, "$TEMP_DIR${System.currentTimeMillis()}")
   182→        tempDir.mkdirs()
   183→
   184→        // 时间跟踪
   185→        val startTime = System.currentTimeMillis()
   186→        val segmentTimes = mutableMapOf<Int, Long>()
   187→
   188→        return try {
   189→            val allWords = mutableListOf<WordTimestamp>()
   190→            var failedSegments = 0
   191→
   192→            // 第一步：提取所有音频段（串行，因为IO密集）
   193→            onProgress(0, totalSegments, 15, "提取音频段...", 0)
   194→            val segmentFiles = mutableListOf<File?>()
   195→            segments.forEachIndexed { index, segment ->
   196→                val segmentFile = File(tempDir, "segment_${index}.m4a")
   197→
   198→                onProgress(index + 1, totalSegments, 15 + (index * 20 / totalSegments),
   199→                    "提取音频 ${index + 1}/$totalSegments...", 0)
   200→
   201→                val extractSuccess = withTimeout(EXTRACTION_TIMEOUT_SEC * 1000L) {
   202→                    extractAudioSegmentWithRetry(videoFile, segmentFile, segment.startTime, segment.duration, index)
   203→                }
   204→
   205→                if (extractSuccess && segmentFile.exists()) {
   206→                    segmentFiles.add(segmentFile)
   207→                } else {
   208→                    Log.e(TAG, "Failed to extract segment $index")
   209→                    segmentFiles.add(null)
   210→                    failedSegments++
   211→                }
   212→            }
   213→
   214→            // 第二步：并行转录音频段
   215→            onProgress(0, totalSegments, 40, "并行转录中...", 0)
   216→
   217→            val completedIndices = mutableListOf<Int>()
   218→            val transcriptionMutex = Mutex()
   219→
   220→            // 使用 coroutineScope 来并行处理
   221→            val results = coroutineScope {
   222→                // 创建分段任务
   223→                val transcriptionJobs = segments.mapIndexed { index, segment ->
   224→                    async(Dispatchers.IO) {
   225→                        if (segmentFiles[index] == null) {
   226→                            Log.e(TAG, "Skipping segment $index (file not extracted)")
   227→                            return@async null
   228→                        }
   229→
   230→                        val segmentFile = segmentFiles[index]!!
   231→                        val segmentStartTime = System.currentTimeMillis()
   232→
   233→                        // 计算本段转录超时时间
   234→                        val transcriptionTimeout = (segment.duration / 60.0 * TRANSCRIPTION_TIMEOUT_SEC_PER_MIN * 1000).toLong()
   235→
   236→                        // 转录该段
   237→                        val result = withTimeout(transcriptionTimeout) {
   238→                            transcribeSegmentWithRetry(segmentFile, config, index, segment.duration, lang)
   239→                        }
   240→
   241→                        val transcriptionTime = System.currentTimeMillis() - segmentStartTime
   242→                        segmentTimes[index] = transcriptionTime
   243→
   244→                        if (result?.success == true) {
   245→                            // 调整时间戳
   246→                            val adjustedWords = result.words.map { wt ->
   247→                                wt.copy(s = wt.s + segment.startTime, e = wt.e + segment.startTime)
   248→                            }
   249→
   250→                            // 线程安全地添加结果
   251→                            transcriptionMutex.withLock {
   252→                                // 去除重叠部分
   253→                                if (index > 0) {
   254→                                    val overlapThreshold = segment.startTime - OVERLAP_DURATION.toDouble()
   255→                                    val filteredWords = adjustedWords.filter { it.s >= overlapThreshold }
   256→                                    allWords.addAll(filteredWords)
   257→                                } else {
   258→                                    allWords.addAll(adjustedWords)
   259→                                }
   260→                                completedIndices.add(index)
   261→                            }
   262→
   263→                            // 删除临时段文件
   264→                            segmentFile.delete()
   265→
   266→                            Log.d(TAG, "Segment $index transcribed: ${result.words.size} words, time=${transcriptionTime}ms")
   267→
   268→                            // 更新进度
   269→                            transcriptionMutex.withLock {
   270→                                val completedCount = completedIndices.size
   271→                                onProgress(completedCount, totalSegments, 40 + (completedCount * 50 / totalSegments),
   272→                                    "转录中 ${completedCount}/$totalSegments...", estimateRemainingTime(completedCount - 1, totalSegments, segmentTimes, startTime))
   273→                            }
   274→
   275→                            result
   276→                        } else {
   277→                            Log.e(TAG, "Segment $index transcription failed")
   278→                            failedSegments++
   279→
   280→                            transcriptionMutex.withLock {
   281→                                val completedCount = completedIndices.size
   282→                                onProgress(completedCount + 1, totalSegments, 40 + ((completedCount + 1) * 50 / totalSegments),
   283→                                    "段 $index 转录失败", estimateRemainingTime(completedCount, totalSegments, segmentTimes, startTime))
   284→                            }
   285→
   286→                            null
   287→                        }
   288→                    }
   289→                }
   290→
   291→                // 等待所有转录任务完成
   292→                transcriptionJobs.awaitAll()
   293→            }
   294→
   295→            // 按时间排序所有单词
   296→            allWords.sortBy { it.s }
   297→
   298→            // 清理临时目录
   299→            tempDir.deleteRecursively()
   300→
   301→            if (allWords.isEmpty()) {
   302→                WhisperResult(
   303→                    success = false,
   304→                    error = "所有分段转录失败。\n\n失败段数: $failedSegments/$totalSegments\n\n请检查网络连接和 API Key 配置。"
   305→                )
   306→            } else {
   307→                // 构建完整文本
   308→                val sentences = buildSentences(allWords)
   309→                val fullText = sentences.joinToString(" ")
   310→                val totalTime = System.currentTimeMillis() - startTime
   311→
   312→                onProgress(totalSegments, totalSegments, 100, "转录完成！耗时 ${formatTime(totalTime)}", 0)
   313→
   314→                Log.d(TAG, "Segmented transcription complete: ${allWords.size} words, ${sentences.size} sentences")
   315→                Log.d(TAG, "Total time: ${formatTime(totalTime)}, Failed: $failedSegments/$totalSegments")
   316→
   317→                WhisperResult(
   318→                    success = true,
   319→                    text = fullText,
   320→                    words = allWords,
   321→                    detectedLang = ""
   322→                )
   323→            }
   324→        } catch (e: Exception) {
   325→            tempDir.deleteRecursively()
   326→            Log.e(TAG, "Segmented transcription error", e)
   327→            WhisperResult(
   328→                success = false,
   329→                error = "分段转录失败: ${e.message}"
   330→            )
   331→        }
   332→    }

   334→    /**
   335→     * 提取音频段 - 带重试机制
   336→     */
   337→    private suspend fun extractAudioSegmentWithRetry(
   338→        inputFile: File,
   339→        outputFile: File,
   340→        startTime: Double,
   341→        duration: Double,
   342→        segmentIndex: Int
   343→    ): Boolean = withContext(Dispatchers.IO) {
   344→        var lastError: Exception? = null
   345→
   346→        repeat(MAX_RETRIES) { attempt ->
   347→            if (attempt > 0) {
   348→                Log.d(TAG, "Retrying segment $segmentIndex extraction, attempt $attempt/$MAX_RETRIES")
   349→                delay(RETRY_DELAY_MS * attempt)
   350→            }
   351→
   352→            try {
   353→                val success = extractAudioSegment(inputFile, outputFile, startTime, duration)
   354→                if (success) return@withContext true
   355→            } catch (e: Exception) {
   356→                Log.w(TAG, "Segment $segmentIndex extraction attempt $attempt failed: ${e.message}")
   357→                lastError = e
   358→            }
   359→        }
   360→
   361→        Log.e(TAG, "Segment $segmentIndex extraction failed after $MAX_RETRIES retries", lastError)
   362→        false
   363→    }
   364→
   365→    /**
   366→     * 转录单个段 - 带重试机制
   367→     */
   368→    private suspend fun transcribeSegmentWithRetry(
   369→        segmentFile: File,
   370→        config: AIConfig,
   371→        segmentIndex: Int,
   372→        segmentDuration: Double,
   373→        lang: String?
   374→    ): WhisperResult? = withContext(Dispatchers.IO) {
   375→        var lastResult: WhisperResult? = null
   376→
   377→        repeat(MAX_RETRIES) { attempt ->
   378→            if (attempt > 0) {
   379→                Log.d(TAG, "Retrying segment $segmentIndex transcription, attempt $attempt/$MAX_RETRIES")
   380→                delay(RETRY_DELAY_MS * attempt)
   381→            }
   382→
   383→            val result = whisperService.transcribeGroq(segmentFile, config, lang)
   384→            if (result?.success == true) {
   385→                return@withContext result
   386→            }
   387→            lastResult = result
   388→        }
   389→
   390→        Log.e(TAG, "Segment $segmentIndex transcription failed after $MAX_RETRIES retries")
   391→        lastResult
   392→    }

   394→    /**
   395→     * 估算剩余时间（秒）
   396→     */
   397→    private fun estimateRemainingTime(
   398→        currentIndex: Int,
   399→        totalSegments: Int,
   400→        segmentTimes: Map<Int, Long>,
   401→        overallStartTime: Long
   402→    ): Long {
   403→        if (currentIndex == 0 || segmentTimes.isEmpty()) {
   404→            // 还没有完成任何段，预估每段需要2分钟
   405→            return (totalSegments * 120L)
   406→        }
   407→
   408→        // 计算已完成段的平均时间
   409→        val avgTimePerSegment = segmentTimes.values.average()
   410→        val remainingSegments = totalSegments - currentIndex
   411→
   412→        return (avgTimePerSegment * remainingSegments / 1000).toLong()
   413→    }

   415→    /**
   416→     * 格式化时间显示
   417→     */
   418→    private fun formatTime(milliseconds: Long): String {
   419→        val seconds = milliseconds / 1000
   420→        return when {
   421→            seconds < 60 -> "${seconds}秒"
   422→            seconds < 3600 -> "${seconds / 60}分${seconds % 60}秒"
   423→            else -> "${seconds / 3600}小时${(seconds % 3600) / 60}分"
   424→        }
   425→    }

   427→    /**
   428→     * 计算分段策略 - 使用预先计算避免浮点精度问题
   429→     */
   430→    private fun calculateSegments(duration: Double): List<AudioSegment> {
   431→        val segments = mutableListOf<AudioSegment>()
   432→        val segmentDurationSec = SEGMENT_DURATION.toDouble() // 600.0
   433→        val overlapDurationSec = OVERLAP_DURATION.toDouble() // 5.0
   434→        val effectiveAdvance = segmentDurationSec - overlapDurationSec // 595.0
   435→
   436→        // 预先计算分段数量，避免无限循环
   437→        val totalSegments = ((duration - overlapDurationSec) / effectiveAdvance).toInt().coerceAtLeast(1)
   438→
   439→        for (index in 0 until totalSegments) {
   440→            val startTime = index * effectiveAdvance
   441→            val segmentDuration = if (index == totalSegments - 1) {
   442→                // 最后一段：处理剩余所有时间
   443→                duration - startTime
   444→            } else {
   445→                // 中间段：固定长度
   446→                segmentDurationSec
   447→            }
   448→            segments.add(AudioSegment(index, startTime, segmentDuration))
   449→        }
   450→
   451→        return segments
   452→    }

   454→    /**
   455→     * 提取音频段
   456→     */
   457→    private suspend fun extractAudioSegment(
   458→        inputFile: File,
   459→        outputFile: File,
   460→        startTime: Double,
   461→        duration: Double
   462→    ): Boolean = withContext(Dispatchers.IO) {
   463→        try {
   464→            // 构建命令字符串，正确处理包含空格和特殊字符的路径
   465→            // 注意：不需要 "ffmpeg" 前缀，FFmpegKit 会自动添加
   466→            val commandStr = buildString {
   467→                append("-hide_banner -y ")
   468→                append("-ss $startTime ")
   469→                append("-i \"${inputFile.absolutePath}\" ")
   470→                append("-t $duration ")
   471→                append("-vn ")
   472→                append("-acodec aac ")
   473→                append("-b:a 32k ")
   474→                append("-ac 1 ")
   475→                append("\"${outputFile.absolutePath}\"")
   476→            }
   477→
   478→            Log.d(TAG, "FFmpeg command: ffmpeg $commandStr")
   479→
   480→            // 使用同步执行以确保能正确获取返回码
   481→            val session = FFmpegKit.execute(commandStr)
   482→
   483→            val returnCode = session.returnCode
   484→            // FFmpeg 可能返回 1（警告）但文件已成功创建
   485→            val success = (returnCode?.value == 0 || returnCode?.value == 1) && outputFile.exists() && outputFile.length() > 1024
   486→
   487→            Log.d(TAG, "Segment extraction result: $success, file size: ${outputFile.length()}, return code: ${returnCode?.value}")
   488→            success
   489→
   490→        } catch (e: Exception) {
   491→            Log.e(TAG, "Error extracting segment", e)
   492→            false
   493→        }
   494→    }

   497→     * 获取视频信息

   499→    private fun getMediaInformation(file: File): com.arthenica.ffmpegkit.MediaInformation? {
   500→        return try {

   502→            val session: MediaInformationSession = FFprobeKit.getMediaInformation(file.absolutePath)
   503→
   504→            Log.d(TAG, "FFprobe return code: ${session.returnCode?.value}")

   507→            if (session.returnCode?.value == 0) {

   523→    /**
   524→     * 从单词构建句子
   525→     */
   526→    private fun buildSentences(words: List<WordTimestamp>): List<String> {
   527→        val sentences = mutableListOf<String>()
   528→        val currentSentence = mutableListOf<String>()
   529→
   530→        words.forEach { wt ->
   531→            currentSentence.add(wt.w)
   532→
   533→            // 检查句子结束
   534→            if (wt.w.trim().matches(Regex(".*[.!?。！？]$"))) {
   535→                sentences.add(currentSentence.joinToString(" "))
   536→                currentSentence.clear()
   537→            }
   538→        }
   539→
   540→        // 添加最后一个未完成的句子
   541→        if (currentSentence.isNotEmpty()) {
   542→            sentences.add(currentSentence.joinToString(" "))
   543→        }
   544→
   545→        return sentences
   546→    }
   547→}

    77→        val activeConnections: Int = 1 // 当前活跃连接数
    78→    )

    80→    /**
    81→     * 下载配置
    82→     */
    83→    data class DownloadConfig(
    84→        val url: String,
    85→        val outputFile: File,
    86→        val segmentSize: Long = 5L * 1024 * 1024, // 5MB
    87→        val enableResume: Boolean = true,
    88→        val maxRetries: Int = 3,
    89→        val concurrentDownloads: Int = 3,
    90→        val cookies: String? = null, // 添加Cookie支持
    91→        val audioUrl: String? = null, // 音频流URL（用于DASH格式）
    92→        val onProgress: (DownloadProgress) -> Unit = {},
    93→        val onSegmentComplete: (segmentIndex: Int, success: Boolean) -> Unit = { _, _ -> }

    96→    /**
    97→     * 分段状态信息
    98→     */
    99→    private data class SegmentState(
   100→        val index: Int,
   101→        val start: Long,
   102→        val end: Long,
   103→        val downloadedBytes: Long = 0,
   104→        val isCompleted: Boolean = false,
